category_title: Young child with severe autism exhibiting physical aggression to escape demands or gain attention
scenario_title: Independent work with leisure materials and removed attention
minimal_context: Lauren is sitting alongside her classmates in her special education classroom, tasked with stacking rings independently while the teacher sits next to her.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here are the rings to stack. I need to complete some work. (Turns body away from the student)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screams, grabs the teacher, and begins pushing and kicking)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here are the rings to stack. I need to complete some work. (Turns body away from the student)

STUDENT: Ring.

TUTOR: Keep stacking.

STUDENT: Look.

TUTOR: I am working right now.

STUDENT: (Screams, grabs the teacher, and begins pushing and kicking)

task.content: Engage with independent work or leisure materials (e.g., picture cards to sort, match, or rings to stack)

context.environment: Self-contained special education classroom for students with autism
context.materials: Independent work or leisure materials (picture cards to sort, match, or rings to stack)
context.social_setting: Regularly scheduled activities alongside her classmates; teacher sitting next to the student

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Teacher explained that she needed to complete some work, turned her body away from the student, and removed attention for 60 s
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Screaming, pushing, kicking, and grabbing teachers

behavior_patterns.condition: When attention is removed during independent work
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Episodes of aggressive behaviors lasted up to 2 min
